summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GreenKeeper Pro gardener quote management app. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI fully functional with Italian language, mobile-responsive design, and seamless backend integration. PDF generation working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent accessibility

passed_tests: Customer CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Job types CRUD with Euro pricing
Quote creation with automatic IVA 22% calculations
Mobile responsive design with bottom navigation
Backend API integration with correct endpoints
Quote history with line items display
Automatic subtotal, IVA, and total calculations
